title: bge-reranker: BAAI open-weight rerank models review | reranker.uk
description: bge-reranker review: BAAI's open-weight cross-encoder rerankers. Covers bge-reranker-base, bge-reranker-large, and the multilingual bge-reranker-v2-m3. Benchmarks, Python usage, pros and cons.
og_description: Free, self-hostable cross-encoder rerankers. Strong English and multilingual quality, easy sentence-transformers integration.
